name: Logic AND
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class LogicAndNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Logic AND"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/logic.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("a", "bool", widget_type="bool")
        self.add_input("b", "bool", widget_type="bool")
        self.add_output("result", "bool")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        a = inputs.get('a', False)
        b = inputs.get('b', False)
        await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
        return {'result': bool(a) and bool(b)}

def register_node():
    return LogicAndNode
